top_signals.title: Where Stock Market Is Headed After Wild Start to Year
top_signals.summary: US equities have seen their share of peaks and valleys in the first six months of 2026, plunging in March as President Donald Trump launched a war against Iran, and then soaring to new heights through the spring powered by a historic run in chip stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks in Qatar on Tuesday following weekend clashes
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran are poised to hold fresh talks on Tuesday in Qatar's capital, President Donald Trump said via social media on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Is Andy Burnham a left-wing Liz Truss?
top_signals.summary: Say what you like about Andy Burnham (and I intend to say a lot) but he’s not short on ambition. Armed with a single by election victory he now intends to oversee “the biggest change in our lifetime to the way Britain is run.” The PM-in-waiting had popped down to London for some selfies before [...]
